title: Essential Economy
description: A lightweight, modern economy plugin built for Paper servers.
body:
# Essential Economy 🪙
EssentialEconomy is a simple, modern economy plugin for Paper 1.21+ servers. Supports MySQL and YAML storage, Vault integration, locale-aware currency formatting, and fully configurable messages — all from a single config file

## Features

- Small file size! The current version is only 45 KB!
- Dual storage — Choose between YAML (file-based) or MySQL depending on your server setup
- Locale-aware formatting — Configure your currency's number format to match your region (e.g. en-US, de-DE)
- Custom currency — Set your own singular/plural currency name and optional custom symbol
- Vault support — Registers as a Vault economy provider so other plugins can hook in automatically
- Suffix shorthand — Players can enter amounts like 10k, 5m, or 1b in commands
- Balance leaderboard — Auto-refreshing /balancetop with a configurable update interval
- Hot reload — Apply config changes instantly with /money reload, no restart needed
